title: Process Mapping Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Process Mapping skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

process_scope_definition.description: Process scope definition: the start event, the end event, and the explicit boundaries of what is in and out of scope

list_process_participants.description: List of process participants and roles involved across all steps and handoffs

existing_process_documentation.description: Existing process documentation, standard operating procedures or system workflows (if any exist)

process_performance_metrics.description: Process performance metrics: cycle time, error rate, rework frequency and transaction volume

technology_systems_platforms.description: Technology systems and platforms involved at each process step

regulatory_compliance_contractual.description: Regulatory, compliance or contractual requirements governing the process

customer_service_level.description: Customer service level agreements or turnaround time commitments
